label: Squarish 2BR — rear-master with wet strip, standard at front near living

adjacencies.note: ensuite and kitchen share a rear plumbing wall — keeps the wet runs on the rear elevation
master at rear, accessed via dining since it doesn't touch the front living room
standard at front-side, accessed directly off living — uncommon but useful when the second bedroom doubles as a guest/study near the LDK
common bath publicly accessible off dining

soft_proximities.note: common conveniently close to standard — guests visiting the front bedroom don't traverse the master wing

notes: Distinct from squarish_two_bedroom (#1) in two ways: the wet core wall is
ensuite-kitchen (not common-kitchen), and the standard bedroom hangs off
the living room rather than off dining.
Combined effect: master is pulled to the rear (sharing its bath wall with
kitchen plumbing) while standard sits at the front near the LDK action.
Useful for households where one occupant needs the quietest rear position
and the other wants easy LDK access (study-bedroom, home-office, kids'
